info.title: Power Platform Billing Policies
info.description: Retrieve and manage billing policies for a Power Platform tenant via the Power Platform API.

get.description: Returns a page of billing policies for the tenant. Use @odata.nextLink / $skiptoken to retrieve subsequent pages until all policies are collected.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return per page.

parameters.name: $skiptoken
parameters.description: Continuation token from @odata.nextLink to retrieve the next page of results.

200.description: OK — one page of billing policies returned.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token.

403.description: Forbidden — authenticated identity lacks Power Platform Admin role.

get.description: Returns a single billing policy by its ID.

404.description: Not Found — policy ID does not exist.

@odata.nextLink.description: URL for the next page of results. Extract the $skiptoken query parameter value from this URL and pass it to the next call. Absent when no further pages exist.

value.description: Array of billing policies in this page.

id.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the billing policy.

name.description: Display name of the billing policy.

location.description: Azure region where the billing policy is located.

createdOn.description: UTC date and time the policy was created.

lastModifiedOn.description: UTC date and time the policy was last modified.

BillingPolicyStatus.description: Whether the billing policy is active.

BillingInstrumentModel.description: Azure subscription details linked to this billing policy.

id.description: Resource ID of the billing instrument.

resourceGroup.description: Azure resource group within the subscription.

Principal.description: The user or application that performed an action.
